from source import knapsack

def test_knapsack_exact_fill():
    capacity = 3
    items = [(3, 10), (1, 5)]
    result = knapsack(capacity, items)
    assert result == 10, (
        f"Expected 10 for capacity={capacity} and items={items}, got {result}. "
        "Bug: items that exactly fill the remaining capacity are excluded."
    )
